allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add embedded datalist plugin with JDBC filtering and tab visibility fixes

- Fix JDBC Datalist Binder filtering using #requestParam.xxx# hash variable
  with conditional WHERE clause for design-time compatibility
- Fix loading issue in tabbed forms by adding tab visibility detection
- Add AJAX timeout \(30s\) to prevent indefinite loading states
- Update documentation with correct filtering approach
- Add working example configurations in docs/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
